# P6 — Submission Package

**Target journal:** Management International Review (MIR; Springer Q1 ABS-3)
**Folder:** `P6_Meta_MIR/`
**Generated:** 2026-05-31

## 📦 Files in this folder

### Submission documents (required by editor)
- `01_manuscript_blinded.docx` — Blinded manuscript for reviewer (no author identifiers)
- `01_manuscript_blinded_vi.docx` — Vietnamese translation for CTU thesis deposit
- `02_title_page.docx` — Title page with author info (gửi editor riêng, not for reviewer)
- `03_cover_letter.docx` — Cover letter to editor (signed)

### Replication package (cho reviewers + OSF)
- `p6_meta_mir_replication_data.xlsx` — Variables coded + regression results + figure data (Excel workbook, 5 sheets)

### Figures (7 files in `figures/`)
- `figures/figure2_icrv_forest.png`
- `figures/figure3_dpl_phase.png`
- `figures/figure4_sensitivity.png`
- `figures/figure5_funnel_plot.png`
- `figures/figure6_year_distribution.png`
- `figures/figure_1_conceptual_model.png`
- `figures/figure_prisma_2020_flow.png`

### Supplementary
- `osf_supplementary_materials.md` — OSF supplementary materials manifest


## 📊 Replication data structure (p6_meta_mir_replication_data.xlsx)

| Sheet | Contents |
|---|---|
| `00_README` | Generation date, source repo, sheet index |
| `01_Variable_Codebook` | Each variable: name, label, definition, source (WBES item), role (DV/IV/Mod/Ctrl), type |
| `02_Regression_Coefficients` | Main models: β, SE, p, 95% CI for all reported terms across all model specifications |
| `03_Turning_Points` | Estimated turning points (where applicable) + 95% bootstrap CI |
| `04_Robustness` | Sensitivity tests, alternative specifications, auxiliary tables |
| `05_Figure_Data` | Source data for each figure (one block per figure) |

## ✅ Pre-submission checklist

- [ ] Read journal "Instructions for Authors" current at time of submission
- [ ] Confirm word count meets journal cap (see master README in parent folder)
- [ ] Confirm format-specific requirements:
  - [ ] Line numbers (some journals)
  - [ ] Running header (APJM)
  - [ ] Separate authors' information file (JIBS)
  - [ ] Title page submitted separately from manuscript
- [ ] Verify blinded manuscript has no author identifiers (already verified)
- [ ] Verify cover letter mentions companion-paper relationships if applicable
- [ ] Upload supplementary materials to OSF + cite OSF DOI in manuscript
- [ ] Confirm Replication Data Statement complies with journal policy
